data.title: 183 Southern Glazer's workers in Louisiana join Teamsters Union for representation after card check.
data.description: In Geismar, Louisiana, on December 12, 2025, a significant development occurred as 183 drivers and warehouse workers at Southern Glazer's Wine & Spirits locations across Louisiana opted to become members of the Teamsters Union. This decision was reached through a card check process, signifying strong support for union representation among the workers.

data.title: Martin Craft appointed as President of Army and SOF Programs at M1 Support Services, will lead all programs under role.
data.description: In Denton, Texas, M1 Support Services has appointed Martin Craft as President of Army and Special Operations Forces Programs. Craft, who previously served as M1's Chief Business Officer for over two decades, will now oversee all Army and SOF programs. His responsibilities will include executive leadership, strategic planning, and operational guidance to ensure the success and development of these programs in alignment with M1's business objectives. Craft's new role signifies a key promotion within the company's leadership structure.

data.title: Van Malone, with 23 years of coaching experience, becomes the 23rd head football coach at Hampton.
data.description: On December 12, 2025 in Hampton, Virginia, Van Malone was appointed as the 23rd head football coach in Hampton University's history. Malone brings 23 years of experience in collegiate coaching, including 18 years at the Power 4 level. This announcement was made by Director of Athletics Anthony D. The new head coach is recognized for his expertise in building strong team culture in his previous coaching positions.

data.title: Kaldalón hf. is acquiring all real estate assets from FÍ fasteignafélag slhf. in a purchase offer agreement.
data.description: Kaldalón hf. and FÍ fasteignafélag slhf. have agreed to Kaldalón's acquisition proposal for all of FÍ fasteignafélag's real estate properties. The deal involves the transfer of all real estate assets owned by FÍ fasteignafélag to Kaldalón.

data.title: Dislike Ticketmaster? Onchain RWA tickets could triumph with TIX's DeFi settlement for events, simplifying payouts.
data.description: TIX is currently in the process of creating a decentralized finance (DeFi) settlement platform tailored for live events. Their platform will leverage onchain tickets to access venue financing and streamline payment processes. This initiative aims to revolutionize how live events are managed by incorporating blockchain technology.

data.title: Park Dental Partners celebrates successful public listing by ringing Nasdaq closing bell in NY.
data.description: The team at Park Dental Partners recently celebrated the completion of their public listing by ringing the closing bell at the Nasdaq Stock Market. This milestone marks a significant achievement for the company, as they continue to grow and expand their presence in the market. The public listing has provided the company with increased visibility and access to capital, allowing them to further their growth and innovation in the dental industry. This event highlights the success of Park Dental Partners and signifies a new chapter in their journey as a publicly traded company.

data.title: Dow Jones falls, AI stocks struggle, Nasdaq lags due to Broadcom's plunge on earnings, while Tesla rival surges.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline while AI stocks struggled, notably Broadcom stock plummeted due to disappointing earnings. The stock market also saw the Nasdaq underperforming, with Tesla's competitor seeing a significant rise. This update indicates a dynamic market environment with fluctuations in stock values.

data.title: In 2025, 66% of short-term Bitcoin traders were profitable for 229 days despite a 30% price drop. Will this continue in 2026?
data.description: This year, short-term traders were able to make profits for 229 days, even with Bitcoin's price experiencing a 30% correction. The question now is whether this trend of profitability will continue into the year 2026.

data.title: Silver's value surpasses oil for the first time in 45 years, with silver at $60 per ounce and oil below $60 per barrel. Silver has surged 110% and oil has dropped 22% this year, marking a significant shift in the commodity market hierarchy.
data.description: Silver has surpassed a milestone not seen since 1980, with its price now exceeding $60 per ounce, while oil remains below $60 per barrel. This means that currently, one ounce of silver can purchase more than a single barrel of oil, a situation last observed in January 1980, if disregarding the anomaly in April 2020 when WTI futures briefly went negative. This shift is not only significant by itself but also signifies a major change in the global commodity markets. Year-to-date, silver, as represented by the iShares Silver Trust (NYSE: SLV), has surged by 110%, while oil has plummeted by 22%. Consequently, the silver-to-oil ratio has reached new record highs, indicating a remarkable trend. This evolution is highlighted as "Silver Completes 45-Year Revenge Against Oil", illustrating how silver has outperformed oil significantly in recent times. This development signifies a notable turnaround as for years, oil was the predominant commodity dictating economic growth trends.

data.title: Global GMP cytokine market to grow at 8.4% CAGR from 2025-2031, driven by immunotherapies. Major players include Bio-Techne, PeproTech, CellGenix.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the GMP Cytokine Market predicts significant growth, with a projected CAGR of 8.4% from 2025 to 2031. Key factors driving this growth include the rising demand for immunotherapies, increased use of personalized medicine, and a growing emphasis on cancer research. The global market offers opportunities in the cell/gene therapy sector.

data.title: Coinbase plans to release prediction market and tokenized equities on December 17 amid growing interest and criticism.
data.description: Coinbase, a popular cryptocurrency exchange, is preparing to introduce its prediction market amid growing interest and scrutiny. This move comes as the platform experiences a surge in activity, with a significant increase in users and trading volume. The prediction market will allow users to make bets on various outcomes using cryptocurrency. This development reflects the increasing diversification of services offered by Coinbase to cater to the evolving needs of its customers.
